reviews.comment:
Sandwich de lomo bien. La ambientación zafa, hay un espacio con mesas afuera. No funciona el restaurante. Súper amable el personal.

(Translated by Google)
The steak sandwich was good. The ambiance is okay; there's an outdoor seating area. The restaurant isn't open. The staff is super friendly.

reviews.comment:
Siempre las mejores instalaciones de la ruta son ACA, entiendo que por pandemia, bajo el stock de productos comestibles, Los precios son un poco elevados. pero el servicio es excelente. Deben darle vida nuevamente al parque y sus instalaciones.

(Translated by Google)
ACA always has the best facilities along the route. I understand that due to the pandemic, their stock of food products is lower, and prices are a bit high, but the service is excellent. They should revitalize the park and its facilities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNS1iaUdREAE
